name: architecture-mcp
description: AI-powered tools for architects and interior designers: 3D concepts, floor plans, material palettes, lighting analysis, cost estimates, and contractor specifications.
author: Thomas Gorisse

tools.name: generate_3d_concept
tools.description: Generate a 3D architectural concept from text description

tools.name: create_floor_plan
tools.description: Create a detailed floor plan (SVG) from room descriptions with dimensions

tools.name: interior_design
tools.description: Suggest interior design with mood board, color palette, furniture placement

tools.name: material_palette
tools.description: Generate material/texture suggestions for walls, floors, ceilings

tools.name: lighting_analysis
tools.description: Analyze and suggest lighting placement for a room layout

tools.name: render_walkthrough
tools.description: Generate a 3D walkthrough specification with embeddable viewer

tools.name: cost_estimate
tools.description: Rough cost estimate for materials, labor, and furnishing

tools.name: export_specs
tools.description: Generate technical specifications document for contractors
